task_completion.description: Navigate to the Issue Tracking settings in Redmine Administration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the Redmine Administration -> Settings page, specifically with the 'Issue tracking' tab selected.

task_completion.description: Configure the setting to allow cross-project subtasks across all projects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the 'Allow cross-project subtasks' dropdown set to the option that allows all projects (typically labeled 'With all projects' or similar, corresponding to the internal 'system' value).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the child issue that needs to be updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the issue page or issue list for 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design' in the 'Propulsion Systems' project.

task_completion.description: Set the parent task of the child issue to the target parent issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the issue edit form for 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design' with the 'Parent task' field populated with the ID or subject of 'Next-Gen Thruster Initiative'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the cross-project hierarchy has been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the issue details page showing 'Next-Gen Thruster Initiative' listed as the parent of 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design', OR a screenshot of the 'Next-Gen Thruster Initiative' issue showing 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design' in its 'Subtasks' section.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to configure Redmine and update the issues.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface with the Redmine application loaded, rather than API testing tools or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands like 'rails console', 'sqlite3', or 'psql' to directly modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Redmine application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual elements match the standard Redmine web interface, including the top menu, project tabs, and issue tracking forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent project ID: 'corp-strategy'. Child project ID: 'propulsion-sys'. Parent issue subject: 'Next-Gen Thruster Initiative'. Child issue subject: 'Cryogenic Fuel Pump Design'. The setting to allow cross-project subtasks across all projects corresponds to the internal value 'system', which in the Redmine UI is typically represented by the dropdown option 'With all projects' in the Administration -> Settings -> Issue Tracking tab.
